title: Official History of the Rebellion, Volume One
content:
{{Top|canon=Official History of the Rebel Movements, Volume One|italics=1}}
'''''Official History of the Rebellion, Volume One''''' was a publication [[Writing/Legends|written]] by [[Historian/Legends|historians]] within [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]].

The project was led by [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]], with [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] researching the events surrounding the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1987-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1989-01-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]''
*<!-- 1989-10-XX -->''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->[[The Star Wars Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Star Wars Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]
*<!-- 1994-07-XX -->[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope'', Second Edition]]
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|''Official History of the Rebellion''}}
